question: What is the actual all-in cost of selling on each major Chinese e-commerce platform?

findings.claim: PDD Holdings quarterly revenue breakdown showing transaction services now exceeding online marketing services (Q1 2024 through Q3 2025)
findings.data: Q1 2024: Total RMB86.8B (OMS: 42.5B, TS: 44.4B). Q2 2024: Total RMB97.1B (OMS: 49.1B, TS: 47.9B). Q3 2024: Total RMB99.4B (OMS: 49.4B, TS: 50.0B). Q4 2024: Total RMB110.6B (OMS: 57.0B, TS: 53.6B). Q1 2025: Total RMB95.7B (OMS: 48.7B, TS: 47.0B, +10% YoY). Q2 2025: Total RMB104.0B (OMS: 55.7B, TS: 48.3B, +7% YoY). Q3 2025: Total RMB108.3B (OMS: 53.3B, TS: 54.9B, +9% YoY). Revenue growth decelerated from +131% YoY in Q1 2024 to +7-10% in 2025.

findings.claim: PDD Q1 2025 operating profit fell 38% YoY to RMB16.1B due to merchant support investments
findings.data: Q1 2025 operating profit was RMB16,085.6 million, a decrease of 38% compared to Q1 2024. Management stated company was 'prepared to make short-term sacrifices and accept declines in profitability' for merchant ecosystem. Cash position as of Sep 30, 2025: RMB423.8 billion.
